context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual feedback for petting interaction, shows affection
context.screen_position: Spawns above Echo at (64, 50), rises upward
context.usage_scenario: Spawns when player pets Echo. 3 hearts spawn in sequence, rise upward 10-15px over 1 second, then fade out. Indicates successful petting interaction.

animation.description: Spawns above Echo, moves upward at 10px/second, fades out after 1 second. 3 hearts spawn with 0.2s delay between each.

visual_specification.details: Heart shape: 4x4px pink (#FF004D) heart icon. Spawn position: above Echo at (64, 50). Movement: rises vertically upward at 10px/second. Lifespan: 1 second. Fade: last 0.3 seconds. 3 hearts total per petting action, staggered spawn (0s, 0.2s, 0.4s).

relationships.shared_with: Pink color with Echo's cheek patch
relationships.differences_from: note_particle: heart vs musical note, petting vs singing. feather_particle: upward vs sideways, pink vs orange.

explicit_negations: Hearts do not bounce or wiggle
Hearts do not grow or shrink
